overall.description: Static shot from a Harry Potter video game depicting the Great Hall at Hogwarts. The scene shows a gothic interior with vaulted ceilings, long wooden dining tables, and students in wizard robes seated throughout. A single student walks through the foreground during the otherwise stationary shot.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with long dining tables and vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from a fixed vantage point near the wall

notable_agents.action: student in dark wizard robes walks from right to left through the foreground at approximately 6 seconds

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed gothic vaulting and dark wooden trusses
long wooden banquet tables with students in robes seated on benches
dark stone walls adorned with framed portraits and decorative wood paneling
ornate iron chandeliers hanging from the ceiling beams
elaborate golden decorative sculpture on a stone pedestal in the foreground

segments.scene_description: Static view of a gothic great hall with high vaulted ceilings and warm artificial lighting. Long wooden dining tables fill the space with students in wizard robes seated and conversing. Stone walls with framed paintings line the right side. Approximately six seconds into the clip, a student in dark robes walks through the left foreground from right to left, passing close to the camera before exiting the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a gothic great hall where the stillness of the architecture is momentarily broken by a passing figure. It begins with a wide view of the vaulted ceilings and warm artificial lighting that illuminates long wooden dining tables filled with conversing students in wizard robes. As the camera lingers on the stone walls and framed paintings to the right, the composition remains static and immersive. The scene then shifts in focus as a student in dark robes enters from the right, walking through the left foreground and passing close to the lens before finally exiting the frame.
